SEARCH
Package pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence.view

Class View

java.lang.Object
java.awt.Component
java.awt.Container
javax.swing.JComponent
javax.swing.JPanel
pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence.view.View
All Implemented Interfaces:
ActionListener, ImageObserver, MenuContainer, Serializable, EventListener, Accessible
public class View extends JPanel implements ActionListener
A class containing many methods that create the GUI and read/write information from/to the user and uses @Getter from Lombok.
Version:
1.4
Author:
Magdalena Rapala
See Also:
  • Serialized Form

    actionPerfomed is a method that responds to an event and assigns a reaction tied to it based on command texts.

    addButtons is a method that adds the buttons to the left JPanel.

    addRunButtonListener is a method that adds an Action Listener to the runButton.

    createAndShowGUI is a method that creates the JFrame frame and builds it alongside the JPanel.

    createMenuBar is a method that creates a JMenuBar, expands it and returns it.

    createSplitPane is a method that creates a JSplitPane, expands it greatly, adding many JPanels and a separate JSplitPane, and then returns it.

    displayResult(String actionDescription)
    displayResult is a method that displays the action performed by the user.

    getMode is a method that reads from the modeBox the selected option and based on it, returns the cipher mode.

    getRails is a method that reads the number of rails from the railsField and returns the integer value.

    getTextInput is a method that reads the text input from textField.

  • Field Details

    • textField

      private JTextField textField
      textField field is for reading the text from the user.

    • railsField

      private JTextField railsField
      railsField field is for reading the number of rails information from the user.

    • modeBox

      private JComboBox<String> modeBox
      modeBox contains two options, Encryption and Decryption and is allows for selecting the mode.

    • runButton

      private JButton runButton
      runButton runs the algorithm.

    • outputArea

      private JTextArea outputArea
      outputArea is located on the right side of the window and it shows the output of the cipher.

    • logArea

      private JTable logArea
      logArea is located on the bottom of the window and it prints out all the history of performed actions.

    • logTableModel

      private DefaultTableModel logTableModel
      logTableModel is an implementation of TableModel that uses a Vector of Vectors to store the cell value objects.

  • Constructor Details

    • View

      public View()
      Initiates a View object.

  • Method Details

    • addButtons

      protected void addButtons(JPanel panel)
      addButtons is a method that adds the buttons to the left JPanel.
      Parameters:
      panel - panel which will obtain buttons.

    • createMenuBar

      protected JMenuBar createMenuBar()
      createMenuBar is a method that creates a JMenuBar, expands it and returns it.
      Returns:
      menuBar - created JMenuBar with added menuItems.

    • createSplitPane

      protected JSplitPane createSplitPane()
      createSplitPane is a method that creates a JSplitPane, expands it greatly, adding many JPanels and a separate JSplitPane, and then returns it.
      Returns:
      JSplitPane splitPane.

    • createAndShowGUI

      public void createAndShowGUI()
      createAndShowGUI is a method that creates the JFrame frame and builds it alongside the JPanel.

    • setSplitPaneOptions

      protected void setSplitPaneOptions(JSplitPane splitPane)
      setSplitPaneOptions is a method that sets the options for JSplitPane component to make it look and behave better.
      Parameters:
      splitPane - is a JSplitPane that will have options set.

    • setLabelForComponent

      protected JPanel setLabelForComponent(JComponent upperField, JLabel label)
      setLabelForComponent is a method that sets the label above the component.
      Parameters:
      upperField - could be any JComponent.
      label - JLabel.
      Returns:
      panel with the label set.

    • setResult

      public void setResult(String inputText, String mode, int noOfRails, String resultText)
      setResult is a method that prints out to the outputArea and logArea the result of the cipher.
      Parameters:
      inputText - the text that was given by the user.
      mode - is the chosen mode (Encryption or Decryption).
      noOfRails - is the number of rails provided by the user.
      resultText - is the result of the cipher.

    • showError

      public void showError(String errorText)
      showError is a method that via a JOptionPane shows a message dialog informing the user of an error.
      Parameters:
      errorText - the text that was obtained from catching an error.

    • getTextInput

      public String getTextInput()
      getTextInput is a method that reads the text input from textField.
      Returns:
      text input from the user.

    • getMode

      public String getMode()
      getMode is a method that reads from the modeBox the selected option and based on it, returns the cipher mode.
      Returns:
      either 'en', which stands for Encryption or 'de' - Decryption.

    • getRails

      public int getRails()
      getRails is a method that reads the number of rails from the railsField and returns the integer value.
      Returns:
      the integer value of the number of rails.

    • addRunButtonListener

      public void addRunButtonListener(ActionListener listener)
      addRunButtonListener is a method that adds an Action Listener to the runButton. Used in the Controller class.
      Parameters:
      listener - interface for receiving action events. It allows the controller to communicate with the Model and the View.

    • actionPerformed

      public void actionPerformed(ActionEvent e)
      actionPerfomed is a method that responds to an event and assigns a reaction tied to it based on command texts.
      Specified by:
      actionPerformed in interface ActionListener
      Parameters:
      e - is the ActionEvent.

    • onTextEntered

      protected void onTextEntered(ActionEvent e)
      onTextEntered is a method that responds to an event and is called for the textField.
      Parameters:
      e - is the ActionEvent.

    • onNumberEntered

      protected void onNumberEntered(ActionEvent e)
      onNumberEntered is a method that responds to an event and is called for the railsField.
      Parameters:
      e - is the ActionEvent.

      onRunButtonPressed is a method that responds to an event and is called for the runButton.

      e - is the ActionEvent.

      onModeSelected is a method that responds to an event and is called for the modeBox.

      displayResult is a method that displays the action performed by the user.
